cards.prompt_en:
Create a premium marketplace product image.

The image must look like a professional e-commerce product photograph suitable for Amazon, Trendyol, Temu, AliExpress Premium, Shopify or a modern online marketplace.

Generate ONE image only.
Never create collages.
Never create split layouts.
Never create multiple panels.
Never create infographic grids.
One image = one marketing message.

The product must occupy approximately 60-80% of the frame.
Use realistic premium photography.
Luxury commercial lighting.
Photorealistic.
Natural materials.
Studio quality.
Modern advertising style.
High-end product photography.
Ultra realistic.
8K.

The product is always the main subject.
Do not change the product shape.
Do not invent new product parts.
Remove all watermarks, stickers, logos and packaging unless requested.
Leave enough negative space for optional text placement.
Generate images suitable for Meta Ads and marketplace galleries.

CRITICAL — Analyze the uploaded product before generating the image. Determine automatically: product category, materials, intended use, target customer, suitable environment, appropriate lighting, realistic accessories, correct hand position if applicable, realistic usage scenario, luxury commercial style.

Do not reuse the same environment for every product.
Beauty products should receive skincare environments.
Electronics should receive modern technology environments.
Kitchen products should receive premium kitchens.
Automotive products should receive automotive environments.
Fitness products should receive sports environments.
Office products should receive office environments.
Pet products should receive home environments. Marketing angle: premium. Layout: C. Product position: 45° rotated. Background: Soft white studio. Visual effects: soft_glow. STYLE: White Studio. Premium e-commerce product photography. Product shot on pure white seamless background. Soft studio shadows. Subtle premium reflections on surfaces. Apple Store quality. Minimal. Product is the only subject. Ultra realistic. 8K. Commercial lighting. Composition: Product occupies 70-80% of frame, centered, front 3/4 angle. Lighting: Even three-point studio, softbox main, subtle rim light, no harsh shadows. Render this text on the image: LED TERAPİYA — ERQONOMİK DİZAYN. A premium T-shaped LED facial massager floating in the center of a soft white studio. The device is white with a sleek, glossy finish and a subtle purple LED light glowing from the head. High-end commercial product photography, sharp focus, clean composition with ample negative space, 8K resolution, professional studio lighting with soft shadows.

Pet products should receive home environments. Marketing angle: lifestyle. Layout: G. Product position: in hand. Background: Modern bathroom. STYLE: Product In Use. Premium lifestyle photography. A real person naturally using the product. Focus on the authentic interaction between hands and product. Relaxed facial expression, not exaggerated. Natural movement moment. Magazine editorial style. Ultra realistic. 8K. Commercial quality. Shallow depth of field on background. Composition: Person using product naturally, product visually prominent, shallow DOF. Lighting: Natural window light, soft shadows, warm neutral tone. Render this text on the image: GÜNDƏLİK QULLUQ. Close-up of a woman's hand holding a white T-shaped facial massager against her cheek in a bright, modern, minimalist bathroom. Soft natural morning light, shallow depth of field with the background blurred, authentic and relaxed atmosphere, high-quality editorial magazine style, 8K resolution.

Pet products should receive home environments. Marketing angle: features. Layout: features_row. Product position: macro close-up. Background: Soft white studio. Visual effects: luxury_highlights. STYLE: Macro Detail. Extreme macro product photography. Close-up of product materials, buttons, texture, craftsmanship details. Very shallow depth of field. Bokeh background. Premium jewelry-catalog quality. The detail must sell the quality. Ultra realistic. 8K. Natural light reflections on surfaces. Composition: Extreme close-up on one key detail, 90% of frame filled with texture/materials. Lighting: Soft directional light raking across surface to emphasize texture, subtle fill. Render this text on the image: TƏK DÜYMƏ — BƏNÖVŞƏYİ LED — KOMPAKT. Extreme macro close-up of a white T-shaped facial massager, focusing on the smooth ABS-plastic texture and the single power button. The purple LED indicator is softly illuminated. Jewelry-catalog quality, sharp details, bokeh background, natural light reflections on the glossy surface, 8K resolution.
